curation_notes: The patch commit is a merge (0.31.0.0 release tag) with 300+ files changed across many features. The XSS fix is within the blog module: the Categories controller new() and edit() functions tightened the input validation regex from /^[^<>{}]*$/u to /^[^<>{}=]+$/u, adding '=' to the blocked character set and requiring non-empty input. The seflink validation was also improved to a strict allowlist pattern. The public-facing blog list view (app/Views/templates/default/blog/list.php line 10) rendered category titles via $category->title without esc() output encoding. Locations were derived from the advisory description (blog category creation/editing) cross-referenced with the patch diff showing changes to the Categories controller and the unescaped output in the blog list view template. L3 hints were made more specific than L1/L2 by naming the blog category subsystem and the specific input field.
